/.title: DemCon 2027 | A Global Left Summit
/.description: February 02–04, 2027 in Brussels, Belgium • DemCon is a gathering for progressive voices who believe democracy is worth fighting for. Together, we're mapping the future, sharing strategies, and building the alliances needed to shape what comes next.
h4: Another world is on her way….…
Another world is on her way...
p: An online series discussing ideas central to DemCon. Help shape our agenda.
Because another politics is possible. One built on care. Not domination. Not fear. For everyone. Without exception. And it starts with us.

DemCon brings together the full spectrum of progressive, socialist, green, feminist, and decolonial movements — not to paper over differences, but to build strategic solidarity across them. Eight thematic verticals. Three days. One common purpose.
A map of the future we're trying to build. Two days of panels, workshops, and conversations shaping what comes next.
From grassroots organizers to global thinkers, these are just some of the voices joining us in Brussels.
From grassroots organizers to global thinkers thinkers, these are just some of the voices joining us in Brussels.
Host a session, lead an online Democracy Salon, or present your research.
Join three days of talks, workshops, and salons spotlighting eight areas of focus.
Join us for three days of talks, workshops, and salons — all spotlighting eight areas of focus.
Partner with us as a small sponsor, indie media voice, or volunteer contributor.
A city built on crossroads. The conversations that shape tomorrow won't just happen on stage.
"The conference that doesn't just talk about the world we want — but starts building it."
